_comment: topic_weights.json - Controls how much each topic is prioritized in intelligence scoring
_instructions: Increase a weight above 1.0 to prioritize that topic. Set to 0.5 to de-emphasize. Range: 0.1 to 2.0

artificial_intelligence.reason: Civilization-scale transition underway; highest strategic priority

geopolitics.reason: Shapes all other domains; major portfolio risk factor

india.reason: Primary geographic focus; fastest growing major economy

semiconductors.reason: Critical chokepoint in AI and geopolitics; supply chain bottleneck

energy_transition.reason: Multi-decade transition with massive capital allocation shifts

venture_capital.reason: Tracks where smart capital flows; early signal of emerging trends

central_banks.reason: Drives asset prices and capital allocation across all sectors

biotech_health.reason: Biology is becoming programmable; large commercial and social impact

china.reason: Second largest economy; key strategic counterpart in most major trends

regulation_policy.reason: Regulatory shifts reshape competitive landscapes overnight

crypto_defi.reason: Monitoring but not primary focus; high noise-to-signal ratio
